generated_oml:
// C1: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoLiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing 3D point cloud data for object detection in the autonomous vehicle's environment"
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera supplying depth-sensed visual data for environmental perception"
]

// C3: Produced Data from Sensing Components
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDARSensor
    base:desc "3D point cloud data generated by Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for object detection and environmental mapping"
]

instance CameraDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
    base:desc "Depth-sensed visual data from Intel Deepsense D435i camera for environmental perception"
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDARSensor, IntelDepthCamera
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle state data including speed, steering angle, and processed sensor fusion outputs"
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for physical vehicle actuation via ROS2 nodes on Jetson Orin Nano"
]

instance SteeringServoActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Handles steering adjustments for the autonomous vehicle's steering mechanism via ROS2 lifecycle management on Jetson Orin Nano"
]

// C4: Data Models and Storage
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud clustering algorithm (DBSCAN) for object detection and segmentation in the autonomous vehicle's environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filtering model for object tracking and state estimation from fused sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control logic implementing lead vehicle detection and speed computation (ISO 15622 compliant)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing time-series data of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) for performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance ObjectTrackDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing detected object tracks (position, velocity) as time-series data for ACC operations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Database storing projected driving paths generated from sensor fusion and ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

// C5: Data Collection and Processing
instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based Data Pre-Processing Feature Engine implementing DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for sensor data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionFE, DataTranslationFE
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity's Data Collection Feature Engine aggregating raw sensor data streams (LiDAR, camera) for processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247-compliant Data Translation Feature Engine ensuring standardized message alignment and unit conversions (LiDAR coordinates, ROS2 topics)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData, CameraDepthData
]

// C6: Core Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization service providing 3D rendering of ego vehicle speed, steering angle, object tracks, and projected driving paths via 3D Visualization FE"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading service that moves ACC control logic (lead vehicle detection, speed computation) from vehicle ECUs to cloud/Digital Twin Entity using NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 and ROS2"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAutomationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management service enabling operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speeds, and trigger emergency braking via Control Panel UI FE with synchronized physical vehicle commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]

// C7: Insights and Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle and environment including ego vehicle speed, steering angle, detected object tracks, and projected driving paths for monitoring purposes"
]

instance ACCControlAutomationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic execution of ACC control logic (lead vehicle detection, speed adjustments) offloaded from vehicle ECUs to Digital Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator-controlled actions including ACC enable/disable, speed setting, and emergency braking commands synchronized with physical vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of ACC efficiency showing fuel economy improvements through predictive maintenance based on sensor data"
]

instance TroubleshootingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Diagnostic capabilities for identifying sensor/actuator failures (e.g., LiDAR drift, steering servo issues) via data collection analysis"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingTrigger : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic emergency braking command triggered by remote operator based on real-time object tracks and ego vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C8: User Interface Components
instance ThreeDVisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization Feature Engine implementing ROS2-based 3D rendering pipelines (e.g., RViz2) for vehicle and environment visualization"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance ControlPanelUIFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel User Interface Feature Engine enabling operator interaction for ACC management and emergency commands"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

// C9: Enablers and Middleware
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware enabling inter-entity communication, component orchestration, and distributed processing across Jetson Orin Nano and cloud entities"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFE, DataCollectionFE, DataTranslationFE, MotorActuationFE, SteeringServoActuationFE
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 platform providing hardware abstraction and acceleration for processing on Jetson Orin Nano devices"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlLogicModel, DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilterModel
]

instance PythonPrototyping : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 environment for rapid prototyping of sensor data processing and visualization components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFE, DataTranslationFE
]

instance CPlusPlusLifecycle : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ implementation with ROS2 lifecycle management for robust component orchestration and actuation"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotorActuationFE, SteeringServoActuationFE
]

instance MATLABSimulation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for simulation validation of ACC control logic and sensor fusion algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlLogicModel
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database system for storing and managing time-series data of ego vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EgoVehicleStateDatabase, ObjectTrackDatabase, ProjectedDrivingPathDatabase
]

// C12: Physical Twin Components
instance PhysicalVehicleChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis component handling steering and speed control for the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle"
    base:isContainedIn AutonomousVehicleEnvironment
]

instance PhysicalAutonomyComponents : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper-level autonomy components hosted on NVIDIA Jetson NX and Jetson Orin Nano microcomputers including sensor fusion and ACC logic"
    base:isContainedIn AutonomousVehicleEnvironment
]

instance PhysicalSensorFusion : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2-based sensor fusion implementation combining LiDAR and camera data via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering"
    base:isContainedIn AutonomousVehicleEnvironment
]

// C13: Digital Twin Entity Components
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized Digital Twin Entity hosted externally to the vehicle, implementing all core processing and control logic"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinSystem
]

instance CloudProcessingUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cloud-based processing unit offloading ACC control logic from vehicle ECUs"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinSystem
]

// C14: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalVehicleChassis, PhysicalAutonomyComponents, PhysicalSensorFusion
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ThreeDVisualizationFE, ControlPanelUIFE, DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction involves the **ACC Controlling FE** in the Digital Twin Entity, which computes desired speeds based on lead vehicle distance (per ISO 15622, Performance Class I ACC) and sends actuation commands via the **Actuation FE** (ROS2 nodes) to the vehicle’s motor and steering servos. Emergency braking commands are triggered remotely through the **Control Panel UI FE**. Communication uses a **Wi-Fi network** with end-to-end latency ≤ 100 ms (3GPP TS 22.185 compliance)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time-scale operates at **real-time granularity**, with data collection and processing synchronized to a **100 ms clock accuracy** (per R6 requirements). The ACC control loop operates at **~10–20 Hz** (adjustments based on lead vehicle distance), while visualization updates occur at **~30 Hz** (for smooth 3D rendering). End-to-end latency between the vehicle and DT Entity is constrained to ≤ 100 ms (3GPP TS 22.185 compliance)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation consists of three primary entities (ISO 23247 framework) with custom adaptations:
  1) **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensor fusion (LiDAR/camera), actuation (motor/steering), and data preprocessing (DBSCAN/Kalman filtering). Components are deployed as ROS2 packages on the Jetson Orin Nano.
  2) **Digital Twin Entity**: Contains the **Data Collection FE**, **Reporting FE**, **Presentation FE**, and **ACC Controlling FE**, orchestrated via ROS2 nodes. Data is stored in an external SQL database.
  3) **User Entity**: Split into **3D Visualization FE** (real-time rendering) and **Control Panel UI FE** (remote management commands). Inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with the Physical Twin Entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates across the **as-designed (ideal)**, **as-manufactured**, and **as-operated** lifecycle stages:
  - **As-designed**: Simulates ACC logic and validates control algorithms via MATLAB/Simulink and ROS2 simulations.
  - **As-manufactured**: Validates sensor fusion (LiDAR/camera) and data preprocessing (DBSCAN/Kalman filtering) on the physical twin.
  - **As-operated**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance (e.g., emergency braking) during vehicle operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic (Performance Class I), validated via MATLAB/Simulink simulations.
  - **Validation**: Real-time testing on the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle, with sensor fusion (LiDAR/camera) validated via DBSCAN/Kalman filtering.
  - **Uncertainty Management**: Data preprocessing handles noise in LiDAR/camera data via clustering and filtering. Clock synchronization (±100 ms) ensures event ordering in distributed systems.
  - **Safety**: Emergency braking commands are prioritized over ACC adjustments to prevent accidents. The system adheres to ISO 23247’s safety-critical design principles."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin technical connection uses:
  - **Inter-Entity Communication**: ROS2 network (intra-vehicle) and Wi-Fi (vehicle-to-DT Entity) with ≤ 100 ms end-to-end latency (3GPP TS 22.185).
  - **Data Protocols**: ROS2 topics (e.g., `/ego_vehicle_state`, `/object_tracks`) and standardized message formats (ISO 23247 Data Translation FE).
  - **Network Architecture**: Centralized DT Entity hosted externally to the vehicle, with distributed Physical Twin Entity components (ROS2 nodes on Jetson Orin Nano)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosted on the NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer (ROS2 nodes for sensor fusion, actuation).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed externally to the vehicle (cloud/server) with:
    - **Data Storage**: SQL database for storing ego vehicle state and object tracks.
    - **Computation Offloading**: ACC control logic executed off-board to reduce ECU load.
  - **User Entity**: Hosted via web-based UI (3D Visualization + Control Panel) accessible remotely."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates horizontally with:
  - **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) Systems**: Leverages 3GPP TS 22.185 for ≤ 100 ms latency with other vehicles (though not explicitly implemented in this case study).
  - **Autonomous Driving Standards**: ISO 15622 (ACC control logic), ISO 23247 (architecture framework).
  - **External Data Systems**: Could integrate with cloud-based fleet coordination or IoT platforms for broader vehicle monitoring."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is **shared**:
  - The **Physical Twin Entity** (vehicle owner) owns raw sensor data (LiDAR, camera) and physical actuation commands.
  - The **Digital Twin Entity** (service provider) owns processed data (object tracks, ego vehicle state) and generates reports for monitoring/management.
  - Privacy is handled via **end-to-end encryption** for Wi-Fi communication and **access controls** on the UI (e.g., role-based permissions for operators/developers)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin adheres to the following standards:
  - **Architecture**: ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework, Part 2 – Reference Architecture), adapted for automotive use.
  - **Communication**: ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2) for inter-entity messaging.
  - **Control**: ISO 15622 (Performance Class I Adaptive Cruise Control).
  - **Networking**: 3GPP TS 22.185 (Vehicle-to-Vehicle communication latency requirements).
  - **Clock Synchronization**: ISO/IEC 1588 (PTP) principles for ≤ 100 ms accuracy."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety**: Emergency braking commands are prioritized over ACC adjustments to prevent accidents. The system enforces ≤ 100 ms latency (3GPP compliance) to avoid catastrophic failures.
  - **Cybersecurity**: Wi-Fi communication uses encrypted protocols (e.g., TLS) for data integrity. The UI implements role-based access control (operators vs. developers).
  - **Redundancy**: Data preprocessing (DBSCAN/Kalman filtering) mitigates sensor noise. The Digital Twin Entity acts as a fail-safe for computation offloading.
  - **Human-in-the-Loop**: Operators must explicitly confirm emergency braking commands via the Control Panel UI, reducing unintended accidents."
]
